svg.title: Live terminal capture: flight view and scanner
svg.desc: Actual 180x54 terminal capture after hiding help, showing the live flight view, scanner contacts, target readout, and dashboard.

g.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Mono, Fira Mono, Consolas, monospace
g.text: ELITE TUI // NEON EXODUS SCORE 0 <> FLIGHT // YELLOW <> ASCII MIXED EDGE ON FILL ON INV OFF
│ SPD 17.7 THR 18 ALT 156 MISS 3 ALERT YELLOW LOCK CORIOLIS │
│ ? help 1 blocks 2 glyphs 3 mixed E edges F fill I invert Q quit │
